title: Pup Go F1 Take Apart Toys, 2 in 1 Build Your Own Racing Car Kit with Electric Drill Tool, 24 Pieces Construction Set, Building Toys for Age 3 4 5 6 7 8 Year Old Boys, STEM Construction Toys for Kids
features: 🚙【Wonderful buildable car kit】26 easy-to-handle take apart pieces, including a car body, chassis, engine, tires, electric drill (requires 2x AA batteries, not included), drill bits, and screws. All pieces are big and easy to use. Perfect construction building toys for 3 4 5 6 7 8 year old boys & girls.

💫【Exciting assemble styles】Kids can build a luxurious or classic sports car independently, fostering children's creativity and fine motor skills. Or can make it with parents together to strengthen your relationship. It's a top gift for 3 year old kids boys.

🚨【Realistic Lights & sounds】It will give off realistic sounds and lights when simply press the bonnet. Electronic drill is powered by batteries, electronic toy drill is just like the real thing. This car will become kids favorite toy.

🌳【Child-safe Material】This fun build and take apart toy is made from non-toxic, recyclable ABS Plastic. This construction toy meets safety standards, providing a safe toy for children to enjoy. Great construction toys for 4+ year olds.

🎁【Ideal Gifts for Kids】This educational construction toy boosts concentration, hand-eye coordination, and confidence while kids build a car. An ideal birthday gift for 3 year old boys, Christmas present for 4 year olds, or STEM toy for 5+ year olds.
